title: Authorities arrest special forces soldier who allegedly made $400K on Polymarket bet involving Maduro operation
summary: A special forces soldier has been arrested for allegedly using classified government information to place a $400,000 bet on Polymarket related to a US operation involving Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro. The arrest highlights concerns about insider trading and misuse of classified information in prediction markets.
content: The soldier is accused of using classified government information to inform a wager on the prediction market Polymarket.

zh.title: 当局逮捕据称在涉及马杜罗行动的Polymarket赌注中获利40万美元的特种部队士兵
zh.summary: 一名特种部队士兵因涉嫌使用机密政府信息进行40万美元的Polymarket赌注（与美国涉及委内瑞拉总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗的行动有关）而被逮捕。该逮捕引发了对预测市场中内幕交易和机密信息滥用的担忧。

title: US arrests soldier who allegedly made $400k on Maduro Polymarket bets
summary: Gannon Ken Van Dyke, a US soldier directly involved in planning Operation Absolute Resolve to capture Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro, has been arrested for using confidential government information to profit over $400,000 through Polymarket bets. He faces multiple charges including unauthorized use of classified information for personal gain.
content:
Nicolas Maduro is seen in handcuffs after landing at a Manhattan helipad on January 5, 2026 in New York City.	

We knew someone made over $400,000 on suspicious Polymarket bets around the US operation to capture Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro, but now we have a name: Gannon Ken Van Dyke. The US Attorney for the Southern District of New York announced Thursday that Van Dyke is in custody, on several charges, including using confidential government information for personal gain.
As described in the indictment, prosecutors allege Van Dyke was directly involved in the planning and execution of "Operation Absolute Resolve" to capture Maduro, and in the days before the capture, made several transactions purchasing "$33,934 worth of 'YES' shares on Mad …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 美国逮捕据称在马杜罗Polymarket赌注中获利40万美元的士兵
zh.summary: Gannon Ken Van Dyke是一名美国士兵，直接参与了代号"绝对决心行动"（Operation Absolute Resolve）的策划，该行动旨在抓捕委内瑞拉总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗，他因使用机密政府信息通过Polymarket赌注获利超过40万美元而被逮捕。他面临多项指控，包括未授权使用机密信息谋取私利。

title: Redwood Materials loses COO amid layoffs, restructuring
summary: Redwood Materials is undergoing restructuring with the retirement of COO Chris Lister, a former Tesla executive, along with departures of at least three other vice presidents. The leadership changes signal ongoing challenges or strategic shifts at the battery recycling company.
content: Former Tesla executive Chris Lister is retiring, and at least three other VPs have left Redwood around the recent restructuring, TechCrunch has learned.

zh.title: 红木材料公司首席运营官离职 裁员重组进行中
zh.summary: 红木材料公司正在进行重组，首席运营官克里斯·利斯特（前特斯拉高管）宣布退休，另有至少三名副总裁离职。这些领导层变动表明这家电池回收公司面临持续挑战或战略调整。

title: Leak reveals new Xbox Game Pass ‘Starter Edition’ that’s part of Discord Nitro
summary: A leaked image reveals Microsoft's partnership with Discord will include a new Xbox Game Pass Starter Edition bundled with Discord Nitro, offering access to over 50 games and 10 hours monthly of Xbox Cloud Gaming. The bundle aims to integrate gaming benefits into Discord's existing subscription service.
content:
Microsoft started teasing a mysterious Discord and Xbox Game Pass partnership yesterday, and a new leak appears to have detailed exactly what's coming. Discord Previews has uncovered a new Xbox Game Pass "Starter Edition" that is bundled with Discord Nitro.
The Starter Edition reportedly includes "access to over 50 games from the Game Pass library," as well as 10 hours a month of Xbox Cloud Gaming streaming and the ability to earn Xbox Rewards points while playing games. It's not clear which games will be part of the more than 50 titles available, but the leaked images suggest that Stardew Valley, Grounded, and Fallout 4 will be included.
 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 泄露信息揭示Xbox Game Pass "入门版"将与Discord Nitro捆绑
zh.summary: 泄露的图片揭示微软与Discord的合作将推出新的Xbox Game Pass入门版，与Discord Nitro捆绑销售，提供50多款游戏和每月10小时Xbox云游戏访问权。该捆绑包旨在将游戏权益整合到Discord现有的订阅服务中。

title: Claude is connecting directly to your personal apps like Spotify, Uber Eats, and TurboTax
summary: Anthropic has expanded Claude's app integrations to include personal services like Spotify, Uber Eats, Audible, AllTrails, and TurboTax, complementing its existing work-related app connections. Claude will now suggest relevant connected apps during conversations, enhancing its ability to assist with personal tasks.
content:
Claude users can access more apps with Anthropic's AI now thanks to new connectors for everything from hiking to grocery shopping. Anthropic already supported connecting numerous work-related apps to Claude, like Microsoft apps, but this expansion focuses on personal apps like Audible, Spotify, Uber, AllTrails, TripAdvisor, Instacart, TurboTax, and others. 
Some of these apps, such as Spotify, already have similar connectors in OpenAI's ChatGPT. Once an app is connected, Claude will suggest relevant connected apps directly in your conversations, like using AllTrails for hike recommendations. Anthropic notes in its blog post announcing the n …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Claude可直接连接Spotify、Uber Eats和TurboTax等个人应用
zh.summary: Anthropic已扩展Claude的应用集成，包括Spotify、Uber Eats、Audible、AllTrails和TurboTax等个人服务，补充其现有的工作相关应用连接。Claude现在将在对话中建议相关的已连接应用，增强其协助个人任务的能力。

title: Visitors to this private space station won't be wearing shorts and T-shirts
summary: Private space station operators are implementing formal dress code requirements for visitors, moving away from casual attire like shorts and T-shirts. The policy reflects the unique operational standards and professional environment of private space travel.
content: Can you wear white after Labor Day if your destination is Earth orbit?

zh.title: 到这家私人空间站的访客不会穿短裤和T恤
zh.summary: 私人空间站运营商正在为访客实施正式着装要求，摒弃短裤和T恤等休闲服装。这项政策反映了私人太空旅行独特的运营标准和专业环境。

title: US accuses China of “industrial-scale” AI theft. China says it’s “slander.”
summary: The US has accused China of stealing AI technology at industrial scale, allegations China denies as slander, creating potential flashpoints for the Trump-Xi summit with discussions of significant sanctions. The dispute reflects growing tensions over artificial intelligence intellectual property and technology competition between the two superpowers.
content: Trump-Xi summit may be rocked by US mulling huge sanctions.

zh.title: 美国指控中国"工业规模"人工智能盗窃。中国称这是"诽谤"。
zh.summary: 美国指控中国大规模窃取人工智能技术，中国否认这些指控为诽谤，在特朗普-习近平峰会上造成潜在冲突点，并讨论实施重大制裁。这场争端反映了两个超级大国在人工智能知识产权和技术竞争上日益加剧的紧张关系。

title: Brendan Carr’s war on wokeness targets inclusive children’s television
summary: FCC chairman Brendan Carr is launching a campaign against LGBTQ-inclusive children's programming, with the FCC's Media Bureau soliciting public comments on whether the TV ratings system has appropriately addressed shows featuring transgender or non-binary characters. The move represents a regulatory effort to scrutinize children's entertainment representation.
content:
Under the guidance of consummate bully / chairman Brendan Carr, the FCC is taking steps towards cracking down on children's entertainment that in any way explores the complexities of gender identity.
On Wednesday, the FCC's Media Bureau announced that it is soliciting comments from the public about whether the TV ratings system has made sound decisions regarding children's programming with transgender or non-binary characters. In a statement about the commenting period the FCC said that it was soliciting feedback due to an alleged uptick in "significant concerns" about whether "controversial gender identity issues are being included or prom …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 布伦丹·卡尔对"觉醒文化"的战争针对具有包容性的儿童电视
zh.summary: 美国联邦通信委员会主席布伦丹·卡尔正在发起一场反对包容性LGBTQ+儿童节目的运动，美国联邦通信委员会媒体局正在征求公众意见，关于电视分级系统是否恰当地处理了以变性或非二元性别角色为主的节目。这举措代表了一项监管努力，旨在审查儿童娱乐的代表性。

title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
summary: Multiple countries are implementing bans on social media for children, with Australia leading the way in late 2025 to address cyberbullying, addiction, and predator exposure. These legislative efforts reflect growing concerns about social media's negative impact on youth mental health and safety.
content: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

zh.title: 这些国家正在禁止儿童使用社交媒体
zh.summary: 多个国家正在实施禁止儿童使用社交媒体的措施，澳大利亚在2025年末走在前面，旨在解决网络欺凌、成瘾和捕食者威胁问题。这些立法努力反映了人们对社交媒体对青少年心理健康和安全的负面影响的日益关注。

title: Carbon nanotube wiring gets closer to competing with copper
summary: Carbon nanotubes are advancing as a potential alternative to copper for wiring applications, though the material still experiences degradation over time. Progress in this area could eventually lead to improved materials for electrical wiring and electronics manufacturing.
content: While this material degrades over time, it could point to better ones.

zh.title: 碳纳米管布线正在接近与铜竞争
zh.summary: 碳纳米管作为铜的潜在替代品在电气布线应用中不断进步，尽管该材料仍会随时间推移而降解。这一领域的进展最终可能导致电气布线和电子制造的改进材料。

title: Bret Taylor’s Sierra buys YC-backed AI startup Fragment
summary: Sierra, an AI customer service agent startup founded by Bret Taylor, has acquired Fragment, a French startup backed by Y Combinator. The acquisition strengthens Sierra's capabilities in the competitive AI customer service market.
content: Sierra, the AI customer service agent startup founded by technologist Bret Taylor, announced today that it has acquired the YC-backed French startup Fragment.

zh.title: Bret Taylor的Sierra收购Y Combinator支持的AI初创公司Fragment
zh.summary: 由Bret Taylor创立的AI客户服务代理初创公司Sierra收购了由Y Combinator支持的法国初创公司Fragment。此次收购增强了Sierra在竞争激烈的AI客户服务市场中的能力。

title: We still don't have a more precise value for "Big G"
summary: Scientists continue to work on determining a more precise value for the gravitational constant Big G, with recent experiments attempting to refine this fundamental physics measurement. The ongoing research demonstrates the importance of precision in understanding fundamental constants of the universe.
content: Such experiments bring "order to the universe, whether or not the number agrees with the expected value.”

zh.title: 我们仍然没有更精确的"大G"值
zh.summary: 科学家们继续致力于确定万有引力常数大G的更精确值，最近的实验试图精化这一基本物理测量。持续的研究证明了精度在理解宇宙基本常数中的重要性。

title: In a first, a ransomware family is confirmed to be quantum-safe
summary: A ransomware family has been identified that uses post-quantum cryptography for the first time, raising questions about why threat actors are adopting quantum-resistant encryption when there is no immediate practical benefit. The development highlights growing awareness of quantum computing threats even before quantum computers become powerful enough to break current encryption.
content: Technically speaking, there's no practical benefit to use PQC. So why is it being used?

zh.title: 首次确认一个勒索软件家族具有量子安全特性
zh.summary: 一个勒索软件家族被确认首次使用后量子密码学，这引发了关于为什么威胁行为者在没有直接实际利益的情况下采用量子抵抗加密的疑问。这一发展突显了人们对量子计算威胁的日益增长的认识，即使量子计算机还不足以破坏当前的加密。

title: Instagram tests a new ‘Instants’ app for sharing disappearing photos
summary: Meta is testing a new Instagram app called Instants that enables users to share photos that can only be viewed once and disappear after 24 hours. The feature adds ephemeral content sharing capabilities similar to Snapchat, expanding Instagram's offerings for temporary photo sharing.
content: The app lets users share disappearing photos with their friends that can be viewed only once and remain available for 24 hours.

zh.title: Instagram测试新的"Instants"应用用于分享消失的照片
zh.summary: Meta正在测试一个名为Instants的新Instagram应用，使用户能够分享只能查看一次并在24小时后消失的照片。该功能增加了类似于Snapchat的临时内容分享能力，扩展了Instagram临时照片分享的功能。

title: Sonos’ big sale on refurbished speakers is about to end
summary: Sonos' refurbished gear sale ends April 24th, offering steep discounts including the Era 100 at $134 and Move 2 at $299. All items come with the same one-year warranty as new products, providing affordable access to quality audio equipment.
content:
The green model of the Move 2 shown here is sold out at Sonos’ refurbished site, but the black or white models are up for grabs. | Photo by Chris Welch / The Verge	

Portable audio and home theater upgrades can be very pricey, which is why we make a habit out of telling readers when there are good deals happening. With that in mind, here’s a friendly reminder that a heap of refurbished Sonos gear is steeply discounted, and will be until the company’s sale ends April 24th.
It’s an opportunity to get refurbished tech that is delivered in like-new condition, all of which are backed by the same one-year warranty that new products have. Sonos always offers a discount when buying refurbished gear compared to buying new, but some of the current sale prices are better than usual. For instance, its smallest plug-in speaker, the Era 100, is down to $134 (versus $219 new). The bigger Era 300 that offers louder, more immersive sound is $329, a huge $150 off discount.
There are also deals on refurbished home theater add-ons, as well as on hybrid speakers that work just as well outside for a barbecue as they do inside, linked to a larger group of Sonos speakers over Wi-Fi. The second-gen Sonos Beam soundbar with Dolby Atmos support and a wider sound than the first-gen model is down to $299 in black, which is $50 less than the best-ever price on a new model (it currently sells new for $499). Finally, the Sonos Move 2 that has a IP56 water-resistant design and up to 24 hours of battery life, plus line-in audio support, is $299. That’s a phenomenal deal considering the cost for a new unit hasn’t gone below $399 since last September. It currently costs $499 new at retailers.
Sonos Era 100 (refurbished)
Sonos’ Era 100 smart speaker is a replacement for the older Sonos One, utilizing two tweeters (left and right) and one larger woofer. In addition to Wi-Fi, the Era 100 also supports Bluetooth audio and line-in playback via an optional 3.5mm to USB-C adapter. Read our review.

Where to

zh.title: Sonos翻新音箱大促销即将结束
zh.summary: Sonos翻新设备销售于4月24日结束，提供大幅折扣，包括Era 100售价134美元，Move 2售价299美元。所有商品都享有与新产品相同的一年保修，为消费者提供了购买优质音频设备的经济选择。

title: Meta is laying off 10 percent of its staff
summary: Meta plans to lay off approximately 8,000 employees (10% of workforce) in May while closing 6,000 open positions. The cuts follow massive investments in AI infrastructure, with the company budgeting $115-135 billion in capital expenditures for 2026.
content:
Mark Zuckerberg presenting at Meta Connect on September 17th, 2025. | Bloomberg via Getty Images	

Meta is planning to layoff around 10 percent of employees in May, according to a memo from the company's chief people officer, Janelle Gale, published by Bloomberg. That means approximately 8,000 people will see their jobs cut. Meta will also be closing around 6,000 open roles, according to Gale.
The cuts follow Meta's significant investments in AI, including spending huge sums to hire top talent and build data centers. The company forecast in January that it will spend $115 billion to $135 billion in capital expenditures in 2026 - a significant increase from its $72.22 billion in capital expenditures for 2025. The increase is to "support o …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta正在裁员10%的员工
zh.summary: Meta计划在5月裁减约8,000名员工（占劳动力的10%），同时关闭6,000个开放职位。这些裁员是在该公司大规模投资AI基础设施之后进行的，2026年该公司的资本支出预算为1150-1350亿美元。

title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you
summary: Noscroll is an AI bot designed to eliminate doomscrolling by reading and summarizing internet content for users. The service targets individuals seeking to break unhealthy scrolling habits while staying informed.
content: Noscroll wants to cure doomscrolling with an AI bot that reads the internet for you.

zh.title: 认识Noscroll，一个为你进行刷屏的AI机器人
zh.summary: Noscroll是一个AI机器人，旨在通过为用户阅读和总结互联网内容来消除刷屏行为。该服务针对寻求打破不健康滚动习惯同时保持信息灵通的个人。

title: Trump’s pick to run US cyber agency CISA asks to drop out
summary: Sean Plankey has withdrawn his nomination to head the U.S. cybersecurity agency CISA following a tumultuous year of interim leadership. His departure creates another vacancy in the critical infrastructure protection role.
content: Sean Plankey has requested to withdraw his name to run the U.S. cybersecurity agency after a tumultuous year of chaotic temporary leadership.

zh.title: 特朗普提名的美国网络安全机构CISA主管候选人要求退出
zh.summary: 肖恩·普兰基在经历了一年动荡的临时领导后，撤回了他担任美国网络安全机构CISA主管的提名。他的离职在这个关键基础设施保护角色中造成了另一个空缺。

title: ‘We Are Xbox’: read the memo defining Microsoft’s gaming future
summary: New Xbox CEO Asha Sharma outlined Microsoft's strategy for the "return of Xbox" focusing on daily active players and priorities of hardware, content, experience, and services. The memo acknowledges player frustrations with infrequent updates, weak PC presence, rising prices, and fragmented discovery.
content:
Asha Sharma. | Image: The Verge, Microsoft	

Microsoft's new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma has laid out a new strategy for what she describes as a "return of Xbox." In a joint memo with Xbox Chief Content Officer Matt Booty, Sharma and Booty lay out their vision for the future of Xbox that will be judged on daily active players and the priorities of hardware, content, experience, and services.
"Players are frustrated," admits Sharma and Booty. "New feature drops on console have been less frequent. Our presence on PC isn't strong enough. Pricing is getting harder for people to keep up with. And core experiences like search, discovery, social, and personalization still feel too fragmented. Devel …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: "我们是Xbox"：阅读定义微软游戏未来的备忘录
zh.summary: 新任Xbox首席执行官阿莎·沙玛概述了微软"Xbox回归"战略，重点是日活玩家和硬件、内容、体验和服务的优先事项。该备忘录承认了玩家对更新不频繁、PC表现较弱、价格上升和发现碎片化的不满。

title: Microsoft’s new Xbox chief is ‘reevaluating’ exclusive games
summary: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma revealed the company is "reevaluating" exclusive games and windowed releases, potentially reconsidering its recent strategy of porting games to PlayStation and Nintendo Switch. No firm commitment to returning Xbox exclusives was made.
content:
Xbox CEO Asha Sharma held an all-hands meeting this morning and laid out her strategy for a "return of Xbox" with employees. While rebranding Microsoft Gaming back to Xbox was part of the agenda, Sharma also revealed that Xbox is looking into "reevaluating" Xbox exclusive games and windowed releases of titles.
It's a hot topic for Xbox fans, who were shocked when Microsoft decided to start porting games over to PlayStation and Nintendo Switch, but there's no firm commitment on a return to Xbox exclusives just yet. "Along the way, we will reevaluate our approach to exclusivity, windowing, and AI, and share more as we learn and decide," says  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软新任Xbox主管"重新评估"独占游戏
zh.summary: Xbox首席执行官Asha Sharma透露公司正在"重新评估"独占游戏和时间窗口发布策略，可能重新考虑最近将游戏移植到PlayStation和Nintendo Switch的战略。公司未对回归Xbox独占游戏做出明确承诺。

title: Don’t stop hiring humans — stop hiring the wrong humans, Artisan’s founder says
summary: Despite Artisan's "Stop Hiring Humans" marketing campaign, the founder emphasizes that assembling the right team remains essential for scaling startups. The comment reflects nuance in the automation debate around hiring practices.
content: Artisan may be known for their bold “Stop Hiring Humans” campaign but the reality is every founder needs to assemble the right team if they want to scale.

zh.title: 别停止招聘人类——停止招聘错误的人，Artisan创始人说
zh.summary: 尽管Artisan推出了"停止招聘人类"的营销活动，但创始人强调，组建正确的团队对于初创公司的扩展仍然至关重要。这一观点反映了围绕招聘实践的自动化辩论中的细致差别。

title: Democrats want to ban ICE from turning warehouses into detention centers
summary: Rep. Rashida Tlaib introduced the Ban Warehouse Detention Act to prevent DHS from converting warehouses into immigrant detention facilities, targeting Trump's mass deportation expansion. ICE recently purchased an 833,000 square foot Salt Lake City warehouse above market value for detention operations.
content:
SALT LAKE CITY, UTAH - Amid an expansion of federal immigration enforcement operations, ICE has reportedly purchased a 833,000 square foot warehouse in Salt Lake City, paying well above its assessed value, to support detention, processing, and logistical needs in the region. (Photo by Justin Sullivan/Getty Images) | Getty Images	

A bill introduced by Rep. Rashida Tlaib (D-MI) would prohibit the Department of Homeland Security from converting warehouses and similar buildings into immigrant detention centers, an attempt to slow President Donald Trump's mass deportations campaign. The Ban Warehouse Detention Act would also forbid Immigration and Customs Enforcement from developing other "non-traditional" detention facilities.
 "ICE and CBP [Customs and Border Protection] are murdering people in the streets, tearing families apart, abducting our neighbors, and locking them in cages. Now they are attempting to buy and convert warehouses across our country into massive pr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 民主党希望禁止ICE将仓库转变为拘留中心
zh.summary: 众议院议员Rashida Tlaib推出了《禁止仓库拘留法案》，以防止国土安全部将仓库改建为移民拘留设施，针对特朗普大规模驱逐出境的扩张。ICE最近以高于市场价格的价格购买了盐湖城一个833,000平方英尺的仓库用于拘留操作。

title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘superapp’
summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5.5, its latest AI model with significantly expanded capabilities across multiple domains. This advancement brings the company closer to its goal of creating an AI superapp capable of handling diverse tasks seamlessly.
content: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

zh.title: OpenAI发布GPT-5.5，进一步接近AI"超级应用"目标
zh.summary: OpenAI发布了最新AI模型GPT-5.5，该模型在多个领域的能力得到显著扩展。这一进展使公司更接近其创建能够无缝处理多样化任务的AI超级应用的目标。

title: Spirit is broken
summary: Spirit Airlines, the seventh-largest U.S. carrier, has requested a federal bailout after years of financial losses and two bankruptcies, exacerbated by a $360 million increase in fuel costs from geopolitical tensions. The sudden distress call suggests the airline's earlier recovery timeline may be collapsing.
content:
The bright yellow livery of Spirit Airlines may soon disappear from the skies. The country's seventh-largest airline has been in financial trouble for years: It hasn't turned a profit since 2019 and filed for bankruptcy twice in the last two years. Despite all that, its leaders predicted that the airline could exit bankruptcy and return to profitability as early as 2027. It just needed time and a little stability to do so.
That time may have run out. On Monday, April 20th, Spirit approached the government to ask for a federal bailout. The sudden rise in fuel prices caused by the war in Iran will add an estimated $360 million in unexpected c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 精神航空公司陷入困境
zh.summary: 美国第七大航空公司精神航空公司在多年的财务亏损和两次破产后，由于地缘政治紧张局势导致燃料成本增加3.6亿美元，请求联邦救助。这一突然的求助信号表明该航空公司早期的恢复时间表可能正在崩溃。

title: Anthropic’s Mythos breach was humiliating
summary: Unauthorized users gained access to Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI model despite the company's strict rollout controls and public claims about its dangerous capabilities. The security breach undermines Anthropic's reputation as an AI safety-focused company.
content:
Anthropic's tightly controlled rollout of Claude Mythos has taken an awkward turn. After spending weeks insisting the AI model is so capable at cybersecurity that it is too dangerous to release publicly, it appears the model fell into the wrong hands anyway. 
According to Bloomberg, a "small group of unauthorized users" has had access to Mythos - whose existence was first revealed in a leak - since the day Anthropic announced plans to offer it to a select group of companies for testing. Anthropic says it is investigating. That's a rough look for a company that has built its brand on taking AI safety seriously while touting the cybersecurity …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic的Mythos漏洞令人感到羞辱
zh.summary: 尽管公司采取了严格的推出控制和关于其危险能力的公开声明，但未经授权的用户仍获得了对Anthropic的Claude Mythos AI模型的访问权限。这次安全漏洞破坏了Anthropic作为AI安全聚焦公司的声誉。

title: Meta to cut 10% of jobs, or 8,000 employees, report says
summary: Meta plans to lay off 10% of its workforce, affecting approximately 8,000 employees, with cuts beginning May 20. The layoffs represent a significant workforce reduction as the company restructures operations.
content: According to an internal memo, Meta plans to begin its sweeping layoffs on May 20.

zh.title: Meta将裁员10%，约8000名员工，报告显示
zh.summary: Meta计划裁员10%，约8000名员工受影响，裁员将于5月20日开始。这次裁员代表着公司在重组运营中进行的重大人员缩减。

title: RFK Jr.’s rejection of germ theory debunked in Senate hearing
summary: Robert Kennedy Jr.'s claims that vaccines contributed little to reducing childhood deaths were contradicted during a Senate hearing. The testimony directly challenged Kennedy's controversial health positions regarding vaccine efficacy.
content: Kennedy falsely argues that vaccines did little to lower childhood deaths.

zh.title: 参议院听证会揭穿RFK Jr.拒绝细菌理论的言论
zh.summary: 罗伯特·肯尼迪二世关于疫苗对减少儿童死亡贡献很小的声称在参议院听证会上遭到质疑。这次证词直接质战了肯尼迪关于疫苗效力的有争议的健康立场。

title: OpenAI says its new GPT-5.5 model is more efficient and better at coding
summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 model excels at coding, debugging, research, and multi-tool workflows, allowing users to delegate complex tasks without micromanaging each step. The model represents a shift toward more autonomous AI assistants that can plan, verify, and adapt independently.
content:
OpenAI just announced its new GPT-5.5 model, which the company calls its "smartest and most intuitive to use model yet, and the next step toward a new way of getting work done on a computer." OpenAI just released GPT-5.4 last month, but says that the new GPT-5.5 "excels" at tasks like writing and debugging code, doing research online, making spreadsheets and documents, and doing that work across different tools.
"Instead of carefully managing every step, you can give GPT-5.5 a messy, multi-part task and trust it to plan, use tools, check its work, navigate through ambiguity, and keep going," according to OpenAI. The company also notes that  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI表示其新的GPT-5.5模型更高效，编码能力更强
zh.summary: OpenAI的GPT-5.5模型在编码、调试、研究和多工具工作流方面表现出色，允许用户委托复杂任务而无需逐步微观管理。该模型代表了向更加自主的AI助手转变，这些助手可以独立规划、验证和适应。

title: Ikea’s new inflatable chair doesn’t look like an inflatable chair
summary: Ikea is previewing an innovative inflatable easy chair as part of a new experimental collection launching in May, featuring fabric-wrapped air chambers and a steel frame. The design demonstrates how modern engineering can elevate inflatable furniture beyond the cheap, lumpy products of the 1990s.
content:
The PS 2026 easy chair is made from two fabric-wrapped air chambers with a steel frame. | Image: Ikea	

Ikea shared a sneak preview of three pieces from a new experimental collection, set to be fully revealed at an annual company event on May 13th. One of the pieces is an inflatable chair that looks like a far cry from the cheap and lumpy inflatable furniture popularized in the '90s.
This isn't the first time Ikea's designers have experimented with inflatable furniture. The Ikea Museum website has an entire page dedicated to what it calls an "idea that fell flat." In 2000 the furniture maker introduced its inflatable Rolig easy chair and Innerlig sofa but they were expensive and suffered from leaky valves, resulting in both pieces slowly defl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 宜家的新充气椅看起来不像充气椅
zh.summary: 宜家正在预览一款创新的充气扶手椅，作为将于5月推出的新实验系列的一部分，采用布包裹的气室和钢框架。该设计展示了现代工程如何能够将充气家具提升到超越1990年代廉价、笨重产品水平的高度。

title: Great news, the Moto G Stylus is no longer teeming with bloatware
summary: Motorola's 2026 Moto G Stylus offers an active stylus, headphone jack, microSD support, and clean software, addressing previous bloatware complaints. The mid-range phone stands out for retaining features many manufacturers have abandoned.
content:
A phone for people who like pens.	

The 2026 edition of Motorola's stylus phone is plenty appealing. 
My review unit is a charming lilac color, has a pleasantly textured back panel, and includes a MicroSD slot and what might be the last surviving headphone jack on a mainstream phone sold in North America. The namesake stylus is no longer just a fancy plastic stick, it's active and comes with some neat tricks. 
Motorola Moto G Stylus (2026)
The latest version of Motorola's stylus phone comes with an active pen, as well as old favorites like a headphone jack and MicroSD support.


Score: 6

ProsCons


Active stylus
Headphone jack! MicroSD card support!
IP68/69 rated
Big screen for the p …



Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 好消息，Moto G Stylus 不再充满预装软件
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉的2026年Moto G Stylus配备主动笔、耳机接口、microSD卡支持和纯净软件，解决了之前的预装软件问题。这款中端手机因保留许多制造商已放弃的功能而脱颖而出。

title: Microsoft brings Xbox back, scraps Microsoft Gaming
summary: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma announced that Microsoft is reverting to "Xbox" as the identity for its gaming division, abandoning the "Microsoft Gaming" rebrand. The move signals a strategic refocus on the iconic Xbox brand.
content:
Xbox CEO Asha Sharma has had a busy week. Sharma held an internal town hall with Xbox employees today, just days after announcing an Xbox Game Pass price cut, commenting on the status of the Xbox mobile store, and teasing a mysterious Xbox and Discord partnership. One of the items on the agenda for the employee all-hands was scrapping Microsoft Gaming.
Sources familiar with the meeting tell me that Sharma announced that Microsoft is returning to using Xbox for its gaming division, instead of Microsoft Gaming. "Xbox needs to be our identity," said Sharma, noting that Microsoft Gaming was a departure from that.
Microsoft originally switched  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软重振Xbox品牌，放弃Microsoft Gaming名称
zh.summary: Xbox首席执行官Asha Sharma宣布，微软正在将"Xbox"作为其游戏部门的身份标识恢复，放弃"Microsoft Gaming"的重新品牌化。此举表明了对标志性Xbox品牌的战略重新关注。

title: Apple's M4 Mac mini, including the $599 one, is gradually becoming impossible to buy
summary: Apple's M4 Mac mini, even the entry-level $599 model, is becoming difficult to purchase, possibly due to an upcoming refresh, supply constraints, or new AI agent development. The shortage suggests either planned product transitions or unexpected demand pressures.
content: Pending refresh? RAM shortage? AI agents? There are many possible explanations.

zh.title: 苹果M4 Mac mini（包括599美元的版本）正逐渐成为无法购买的产品
zh.summary: 苹果的M4 Mac mini，即使是入门级的599美元型号，也变得难以购买，可能是由于即将推出的新版本、供应限制或新的AI代理开发。这种短缺表明要么是计划中的产品更新，要么是出乎意料的需求压力。

title: Keychron’s customizable V1 mechanical keyboard is back down to $45
summary: The Keychron V1 mechanical keyboard is on sale for $44.99 through April 25 at Woot, matching its all-time low, and offers hot-swappable switches and customization features typically found in pricier boards. The keyboard delivers premium typing experience for budget-conscious users.
content:
If you’ve ever wished your laptop keyboard was better tailored to your workflow, the Keychron V1 is a solid upgrade. It doesn’t cost as much as most other mechanical keyboards, but it still offers a lot of the same flexibility. And now through April 25th, you can buy the wired board for $44.99 ($30 off) with red switches from Woot, matching its all-time low price. Other models are also on sale at Amazon and directly from Keychron for about $25 more.
Keychron V1

Where to Buy:

 $84.99 $66.29 at Amazon
 $84.99 $69.99 at Keychron
 $74.99 $44.99 at Woot

The V1 includes features you don’t always get at this price. It nearly matches the typing experience of more expensive keyboards, offering a sturdy build that feels nice to type on. The keyboard also offers a small 75 percent layout that mimics a laptop-style keyboard without the numpad.
It’s also customizable. The V1 supports hot-swappable switches, so you’re not stuck with the red ones that come with this discounted model and can easily change how it feels later on. It also works with VIA software, letting you customize keys and create shortcuts that fit how you actually use your keyboard, whether that’s for work or play. You also get customizable RGB backlighting if you want to add a bit more style to your work setup.
Beyond that, the keyboard offers double-shot PBT keycaps that ​​are more durable than what you’ll find on cheaper boards, so they won’t wear down quickly. It also works with both Mac and Windows right out of the box. A switch on the back lets you toggle easily between the two.
More deals and discounts
Skullcandy’s Method 360 ANC are on sale for $77.99 ($52 off) at Amazon and Best Buy, which is $3 shy of their all-time low price. Created in partnership with Bose, the budget-friendly wireless earbuds feature sound tuning alongside a secure, comfortable fit, thanks to three ear gel and fin sizes that help block out noise. A four-mic hybrid ANC system helps tune out distractions, while a Stay-Aware mode le

zh.title: Keychron可定制V1机械键盘降价至45美元
zh.summary: Keychron V1机械键盘在Woot上以44.99美元的价格促销至4月25日，创历史低价，提供通常在更昂贵键盘中才能找到的热插拔开关和定制功能。该键盘为预算有限的用户提供高级打字体验。

title: US Space Command: Russia is now operationalizing co-orbital ASAT weapons
summary: The U.S. Space Command reports that Russia is operationalizing co-orbital anti-satellite weapons positioned to threaten American high-value satellites in orbit. This development escalates the space arms race and poses a direct threat to critical U.S. space infrastructure.
content: "They’re putting operational systems up within orbit reach of our high-value satellites."

zh.title: 美国太空司令部：俄罗斯现在正在开发共轨反卫星武器
zh.summary: 美国太空司令部报告称，俄罗斯正在开发共轨反卫星武器，这些武器位置可对美国轨道上的高价值卫星构成威胁。这一发展升级了太空军备竞赛，对美国关键太空基础设施构成直接威胁。

title: Bluesky now supports better quality photos
summary: Bluesky has increased photo quality support, raising the maximum file size to 2MB and resolution to 4000x4000 pixels. The improvement allows users to share higher-fidelity images on the platform.
content: The max size is now 2MB and max resolution is 4000x4000.

zh.title: Bluesky现在支持更高质量的照片
zh.summary: Bluesky提高了照片质量支持，将最大文件大小提高到2MB，分辨率提高到4000x4000像素。这一改进允许用户在该平台上分享更高保真度的图像。

title: Microsoft offers buyout for up to 7% of U.S. employees
summary: Microsoft is offering voluntary retirement buyouts to eligible U.S. employees with a combined age and years of service totaling 70 or more. The program provides an alternative to involuntary layoffs while reducing workforce costs.
content: If a worker's years of service at Microsoft plus their age equals 70 or more, they will be eligible for a voluntary retirement buyout.

zh.title: 微软为合格美国员工提供最高达7%的买断方案
zh.summary: 微软向符合条件的美国员工提供自愿退休买断，条件是年龄和服务年限的总和达到70或以上。该项目提供了一个替代非自愿裁员的选择，同时降低劳动力成本。

title: Apple stops weirdly storing data that let cops spy on Signal chats
summary: Apple has fixed a security vulnerability that stored Signal chat data even after the app was deleted, potentially enabling law enforcement surveillance. Signal praised Apple for addressing the privacy flaw and removing an unintended surveillance vector.
content: Signal “very happy” Apple fixed bug storing private chats after app was deleted.

zh.title: 苹果停止存储允许警察监视Signal聊天的数据
zh.summary: 苹果修复了一个安全漏洞，该漏洞在应用删除后仍存储Signal聊天数据，可能导致执法部门监控。Signal赞扬苹果解决了隐私漏洞并消除了一个无意的监视向量。

title: Eight months early and under budget, the Roman Telescope is ready to launch
summary: NASA's Roman Space Telescope is ready for launch eight months ahead of schedule and under budget, having repurposed existing spy satellite hardware for infrared astronomical observations. The accelerated timeline and cost savings represent a significant achievement in space telescope development.
content: Spy satellite hardware has been repurposed to scan the Universe in the infrared.

zh.title: 提前八个月、预算内完成，罗曼太空望远镜已准备好发射
zh.summary: 美国航空航天局的罗曼太空望远镜已准备就绪，比计划提前八个月发射，预算也未超支，它利用现有的间谍卫星硬件进行红外天文观测。加快的时间表和成本节约代表了太空望远镜开发的重大成就。

title: Era raises $11M to build a software platform for AI gadgets
summary: Era has raised $11 million to develop a software platform supporting various AI hardware form factors including glasses, rings, and pendants. The funding reflects investor confidence in the emerging market for AI-powered wearables.
content: Era thinks that we will see many form factors of AI hardware, including glasses, rings, and pendants.

zh.title: Era融资1100万美元打造AI小工具软件平台
zh.summary: Era筹集1100万美元开发一个软件平台，支持各种AI硬件形式，包括眼镜、戒指和吊坠。这笔融资反映了投资者对新兴AI可穿戴设备市场的信心。

title: Meta is revamping its cross-app management system
summary: Meta's Accounts Center is transitioning to a unified Meta Account designed to simplify managing experiences across Meta's apps and devices. The change aims to improve user convenience in handling settings across Facebook, Instagram, and other platforms.
content: Meta's Accounts Center will transition to the Meta Account, which is supposed to make it easier to manage your experience on various Meta apps and devices.

zh.title: Meta正在改革其跨应用管理系统
zh.summary: Meta的账户中心正在过渡到统一的Meta账户，旨在简化在Meta应用和设备间管理体验。该变更旨在改善用户在Facebook、Instagram和其他平台上管理设置的便利性。

title: X is shutting down Communities because of low usage and lots of spam
summary: X is discontinuing its Communities feature due to minimal adoption and widespread spam abuse. The shutdown affects only a fraction of the platform's users, indicating the feature failed to gain significant traction.
content: X Communities are no more. Only a fraction of X users were using Communities, and much of that use was spam, the company said.

zh.title: X 因使用率低和大量垃圾内容关闭社区功能
zh.summary: X 由于采用率低和广泛的垃圾邮件滥用，正在停止其社区功能。关闭仅影响该平台的一小部分用户，表明该功能未能获得显著关注。

title: BMW bumps the 7 Series for 2027, adds all-new battery
summary: BMW's redesigned 2027 7 Series is available as a pure EV, with an inline-six engine, or as an inline-six plug-in hybrid, all featuring an all-new battery. The refresh demonstrates the luxury automaker's commitment to offering diverse powertrain options.
content: The 2027 7 Series is available as an EV, with an inline-six, or an inline-six PHEV.

zh.title: 宝马推出 2027 款 7 系，配备全新电池
zh.summary: 宝马重新设计的 2027 款 7 系提供纯电动、直列六缸或直列六缸插电混合动力版本，均配备全新电池。这次更新展示了这家豪华汽车制造商致力于提供多样化动力总成的承诺。

title: Salmon raises $100M in equity and debt to bring digital credit to underbanked Filipinos
summary: Salmon has secured $100 million in combined equity and debt funding to provide digital credit services to underbanked Filipinos with limited or no credit history. The startup targets customers frustrated with incumbent lenders' reliability issues.
content: Salmon is targeting underbanked Filipinos, with little to no credit history, as well as people unhappy with the incumbent lenders' reliability issues.

zh.title: Salmon 筹集 1 亿美元股权和债务融资，为服务不足的菲律宾人提供数字信贷
zh.summary: Salmon 获得了 1 亿美元的股权和债务融资，为金融服务不足且信用记录有限或无信用记录的菲律宾人提供数字信贷服务。这家初创公司的目标客户是对现有贷方可靠性感到沮丧的人。

title: Surveillance vendors caught abusing access to telcos to track people’s phone locations, researchers say
summary: The Citizen Lab discovered surveillance vendors exploiting cellular network access to track people's phone locations worldwide. This vulnerability reveals how telco infrastructure can be abused by third parties to conduct surveillance at scale.
content: The Citizen Lab found two separate surveillance vendors abusing the backbone of cellular networks to spy on several victims across the world.

zh.title: 监控供应商滥用对电信公司的访问权限追踪人们的手机位置,研究人员表示
zh.summary: 公民实验室发现监控供应商利用蜂窝网络访问权限在全球范围内追踪人们的手机位置。这一漏洞揭示了电信基础设施如何被第三方滥用以进行大规模监控。

title: Beehiiv rolls out new creator tools, including webinars and customizable paywalls
summary: Beehiiv is expanding beyond its newsletter platform with new webinar and customizable paywall features. The move positions the company as a comprehensive creator tools platform serving a broader audience.
content: Beehiiv is clearly done being just a newsletter platform based on today's launch of a new webinar feature, customizable paywalls, and more.

zh.title: Beehiiv推出新的创作者工具,包括网络研讨会和可定制的付费墙
zh.summary: Beehiiv通过新的网络研讨会和可定制付费墙功能扩展其新闻通讯平台。这一举措将该公司定位为为更广泛受众服务的综合创作者工具平台。

title: Tim Cook’s departure is the start of a new era at Apple
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down this September and will be replaced by John Ternus, the head of hardware. The transition marks the end of an era where executives hired during Steve Jobs' tenure led the company.
content:
Apple is about to become a very different company. This September, Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down and will be replaced by John Ternus, the current head of hardware. But the shift is bigger than just a CEO transition - it's the most significant move yet into a world where Apple's executive team isn't handpicked by Steve Jobs.
With the departure of Cook, who became CEO in 2011, the list of leaders who were in Jobs' inner circle is dwindling. There's still Apple's senior vice president of services, Eddy Cue, who joined in 1989, and has said that Jobs was like a "family member" to him. There's also longtime marketing exec Phil Schiller, wh …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 蒂姆·库克的离职标志着苹果新时代的开始
zh.summary: 苹果首席执行官蒂姆·库克将于今年9月下台,由硬件主管约翰·特努斯取代。这一过渡标志着由史蒂夫·乔布斯任期内聘用的高管领导公司的时代结束。

title: Govee’s new colorful outdoor lights are its first with solar power
summary: Govee announced its first solar-powered outdoor lights, featuring a 6W solar panel with integrated 4,800mAh battery, priced at $99.99. The string lights include eight color-changing bulbs on a 34-foot cable and can run up to 13 hours on a full charge.
content:
Eight bulbs are powered by a rechargeable battery built into a 6W solar panel. | Image: Govee	

Govee announced its first solar-powered lights today. They include a 6W panel with an integrated 4,800mAh battery that can be recharged with a single full day of sunlight (though if the weather's looking a little overcast, you can still charge it over USB-C). The Govee Outdoor Solar String Lights are available now through the company's online store and Amazon for $99.99 and feature eight color-changing bulbs on a 34-foot cable.
On a full charge the bulbs will run for up to 13 hours, Govee claims, but that's with their brightness limited to just 10 lumens. The bulbs have a maximum brightness of up to 50 lumens, but you can expect the battery …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Govee的新型彩色户外灯是其首款太阳能产品
zh.summary: Govee推出了首款太阳能户外灯，配备6W太阳能电池板和集成4,800mAh电池，价格为$99.99。这款串灯包括34英尺电缆上的8个变色灯泡，满电后可运行长达13小时。

title: Microsoft launches ‘vibe working’ in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint
summary: Microsoft is rolling out Agent Mode in Office apps like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, a more capable version of Copilot that can take action on documents. The feature represents a significant advancement in AI capabilities within productivity software.
content:
Microsoft is rolling out a new Agent Mode inside Office apps like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint this week. Previously described by Microsoft as "vibe working," the Agent Mode is a more powerful version of the Copilot experience in Office that Microsoft has been trying to sell to businesses.
"When we first shipped Copilot, foundation models were not powerful enough to use Copilot to command the applications," admits Sumit Chauhan, corporate vice president of Microsoft's Office Product Group. "This meant Copilot was a passive partner in documents: it could answer questions but missed the mark when it was asked to take action on the canvas direc …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软在Word、Excel和PowerPoint中推出代理模式
zh.summary: 微软正在Word、Excel和PowerPoint等Office应用中推出代理模式，这是Copilot的更强大版本，可以对文档执行操作。该功能代表了生产力软件中AI功能的重大进步。

title: Meta will now allow parents to see the topics their child discussed with Meta AI
summary: Meta is introducing a new parental control feature allowing parents to view the topics their children discuss with Meta AI. Topics are categorized into areas like School, Entertainment, Health, and Travel.
content: Topics can range from "School," "Entertainment," and "Lifestyle" to "Travel," "Writing," and "Health and Wellbeing," among others, Meta says.

zh.title: Meta现在允许家长查看其子女与Meta AI讨论的主题
zh.summary: Meta推出了一项新的家长控制功能，允许家长查看其子女与Meta AI讨论的主题。主题被分类为学校、娱乐、健康和旅行等领域。

title: Honor’s new phones look like iPhones for Android
summary: Honor released the Honor 600 and 600 Pro phones with design aesthetics strikingly similar to iPhones, positioning them as "accessible flagships." Both models feature IP69K water resistance, OLED displays, and 6,400mAh batteries.
content:
Honor has announced the 600 and 600 Pro, which it calls "accessible flagships," and they look… familiar. Especially in that orange.
The Pro makes the iPhone comparison especially obvious thanks to its triple rear camera - it even has the same flash layout - while the 600 is just a hair subtler because it drops the Pro's 3.5x telephoto lens. Honor actually pulled the same move with last year's iPhone Air-inspired Honor 500, but that phone only launched in Asia.
Both phones have IP69K water-resistance ratings (a tougher rating that covers testing with water jets closer to the phone), midsize 6.57-inch OLED displays, and big 6,400mAh batterie …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 荣耀新手机看起来像iPhone的安卓版本
zh.summary: 荣耀发布了荣耀600和600 Pro手机，设计美学与iPhone惊人相似，将其定位为"平价旗舰机"。两款机型都具有IP69K防水性能、OLED屏幕和6400mAh电池。

title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
summary: India's non-gaming app market is experiencing rapid growth driven by streaming and AI, but global platforms are capturing most revenue gains despite strong user growth. The disparity highlights challenges for local developers profiting from India's expanding digital economy.
content: Non-gaming apps, led by streaming and AI, are driving growth, even as India's spending per user lags global peers.

zh.title: 印度应用市场繁荣——但全球平台获得了大部分收益
zh.summary: 印度非游戏应用市场在流媒体和人工智能的驱动下经历快速增长，但全球平台正在获得大部分收入收益，尽管用户增长强劲。这种差异突出了本地开发者从印度不断扩大的数字经济中获利的挑战。

title: Shade lands $14M to let creative teams search their video libraries in plain English
summary: Shade raised $14 million to provide creative teams with AI-powered natural language search for video libraries. The startup has developed proprietary filesystem technology enabling direct file streaming to local drives.
content: Shade has its own filesystem that lets you "stream" files directly to your local drive

zh.title: Shade获得1400万美元融资让创意团队用英文搜索视频库
zh.summary: Shade获得1400万美元融资为创意团队提供由人工智能驱动的自然语言视频库搜索功能。该初创公司开发了专有文件系统技术，可实现本地驱动器的直接文件流传输。

title: The Iranian women Trump ‘saved’ from execution are simultaneously real and AI-manipulated
summary: President Trump claimed to have secured the release of eight Iranian women facing execution, but photos he posted were widely criticized as AI-generated. The incident highlights the intersection of AI-generated imagery and political claims.
content:
On Wednesday, President Donald Trump claimed to have secured the release of eight Iranian women condemned to execution for protesting the regime. 
Only the night before, he had posted on Truth Social about the imminent executions of these women, quoting a screenshot that included a collage of eight glamorously backlit, soft-focus portraits. The photos of the women were immediately accused of being AI-generated. "Trump is begging Iranian leaders to not execute 8 AI-generated women. This is the funniest thing I've ever seen," said one viral X post.


Trump is begging Iranian leaders to not execute 8 AI-generated women. This is the funniest th …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普"拯救"的伊朗妇女既真实又被AI操纵
zh.summary: 特朗普总统声称已确保八名面临死刑的伊朗妇女获释，但他发布的照片被广泛批评为AI生成的。这一事件突出了AI生成图像和政治言论的交集。
